article.title: OpenAI ships GPT-5 Mini for chat and coding

compact_comments: Fast rollout, but the interesting part is the lower-latency tool use.
This looks more meaningful for coding workflows than raw benchmark bragging.

The launch emphasized practical tool use and cost efficiency.
